data.name: AdvancedAuditHistory_Display_Key
data.comment: Display name for the Advanced Audit History control

data.name: AdvancedAuditHistory_Desc_Key
data.value: Enterprise-grade audit history control with advanced filtering, analytics, and visualization capabilities
data.comment: Description for the Advanced Audit History control

data.name: advancedAuditHistoryBoundField_Display_Key
data.comment: Display name for the bound field property

data.name: advancedAuditHistoryBoundField_Desc_Key
data.value: The field to bind the control to (required for PCF framework)
data.comment: Description for the bound field property

data.name: configurationParameters_Display_Key
data.comment: Display name for configuration parameters

data.name: configurationParameters_Desc_Key
data.value: Optional configuration parameters for customizing control behavior
data.comment: Description for configuration parameters

data.name: advanced-audit-history-dropdown-placeholder
data.value: Choose fields to filter the audit history

data.name: restore-description
data.value: Are you sure you want to restore the selected record(s)?

data.name: advanced-audit-history-toolbar-search-tooltip-text
data.value: Search and filter audit records by user names, field names, field values, or operation details. Results update in real-time as you type. Click the X icon to clear the search.
data.comment: Tooltip for the search input in the toolbar

data.name: advanced-audit-history-toolbar-viewtype-tooltip-text
data.value: Switch between different view layouts for audit records. Card view displays detailed information in expandable cards, while Card-Timeline view adds chronological ordering with visual timeline markers.
data.comment: Tooltip for the view type selector in the toolbar

data.name: advanced-audit-history-toolbar-analytics-tooltip-text
data.value: View comprehensive analytics dashboard with visual charts, trend analysis, and compliance monitoring. See audit activity over time, top changed fields, most active users, and change frequency patterns.
data.comment: Tooltip for the analytics dashboard button in the toolbar

data.name: advanced-audit-history-toolbar-filters-tooltip-text
data.value: Apply advanced filters to narrow down audit records by user, action type, or specific changes. Quickly find the exact audit trail you need.
data.comment: Tooltip for the filters button in the toolbar

data.name: advanced-audit-history-toolbar-clear-filters-tooltip-text
data.value: Clear all active filters and reset to default view. This will remove user, attribute, action type, operation, and date range filters.
data.comment: Tooltip for the clear all filters button in the toolbar

data.name: advanced-audit-history-toolbar-refresh-tooltip-text
data.value: Refresh audit history data to see the latest changes. This will reload all audit records based on your current filter settings.
data.comment: Tooltip for the refresh button in the toolbar

data.name: advanced-audit-history-toolbar-export-tooltip-text
data.value: Export audit history data to different file formats. Choose Excel for detailed spreadsheets with formatting, CSV for raw data import, or PDF for printable reports and documentation.
data.comment: Tooltip for the export menu in the toolbar

data.name: advanced-audit-history-toolbar-settings-tooltip-text
data.value: Configure display options, enable auto-refresh, manage field visibility settings, and customize your audit history viewing experience.
data.comment: Tooltip for the settings button in the toolbar

data.name: advanced-audit-history-toolbar-maximize-tooltip-text
data.value: Maximize the audit history view to full screen for better visibility and focus. Press Escape to exit full screen mode.
data.comment: Tooltip for the maximize button in the toolbar

data.name: advanced-audit-history-toolbar-search-placeholder-text
data.comment: Placeholder text for the search input in the toolbar

data.name: advanced-audit-history-toolbar-sort-ascending-tooltip-text
data.value: Sort audit records by date. Currently sorted in ascending order. Click to toggle between ascending and descending order.
data.comment: Tooltip for the sort button when in ascending order

data.name: advanced-audit-history-toolbar-sort-descending-tooltip-text
data.value: Sort audit records by date. Currently sorted in descending order. Click to toggle between ascending and descending order.
data.comment: Tooltip for the sort button when in descending order

data.name: advanced-audit-history-toolbar-viewtype-aria-label
data.comment: ARIA label for the view type selector button in the toolbar

data.name: advanced-audit-history-toolbar-analytics-aria-label
data.comment: ARIA label for the analytics dashboard button in the toolbar

data.name: advanced-audit-history-toolbar-export-aria-label
data.comment: ARIA label for the export menu button in the toolbar

data.name: advanced-audit-history-error-panel-no-permission-title
data.comment: Title for the error panel when user does not have permission to view audit history

data.name: advanced-audit-history-error-panel-no-permission-message
data.value: You do not have permission to view audit history. Please contact your system administrator to request access.
data.comment: Message for the error panel when user does not have permission to view audit history

data.name: advanced-audit-history-error-panel-audit-not-enabled-title
data.comment: Title for the error panel when audit logging is not enabled for the entity

data.name: advanced-audit-history-error-panel-audit-not-enabled-message
data.value: Audit logging is not enabled for this entity. Please enable auditing in the entity settings to track changes.
data.comment: Message for the error panel when audit logging is not enabled for the entity

data.name: advanced-audit-history-error-panel-no-audit-data-title
data.comment: Title for the error panel when no audit data is available for the entity

data.name: advanced-audit-history-error-panel-no-audit-data-message
data.value: No audit history records found for this entity. Changes may not have been tracked yet, or audit logging might not be enabled for this entity.
data.comment: Message for the error panel when no audit data is available for the entity

data.name: advanced-audit-history-error-panel-default-title
data.comment: Default title for the error panel when no specific error type matches

data.name: advanced-audit-history-error-panel-default-message
data.comment: Default message for the error panel when no specific error type matches

data.name: advanced-audit-history-table-cell-field-tooltip
data.value: The name of the field that was changed in this audit record
data.comment: Tooltip for the Field column header in the audit attributes table

data.name: advanced-audit-history-table-cell-field-type-tooltip
data.value: The data type of the field (e.g., String, Lookup, DateTime, Money)
data.comment: Tooltip for the Field Type column header in the audit attributes table

data.name: advanced-audit-history-table-cell-old-value-tooltip
data.value: The previous value of the field before the change was made
data.comment: Tooltip for the Old Value column header in the audit attributes table

data.name: advanced-audit-history-table-cell-new-value-tooltip
data.value: The new value of the field after the change was made
data.comment: Tooltip for the New Value column header in the audit attributes table

data.name: advanced-audit-history-table-cell-action-tooltip
data.value: Restore individual field values to their previous state from this audit entry
data.comment: Tooltip for the Action column header in the audit attributes table

data.name: settings-panel-title
data.comment: Title for the settings panel drawer

data.name: settings-panel-tab-display
data.comment: Display Options tab label in settings panel

data.name: settings-panel-tab-refresh
data.comment: Data Refresh tab label in settings panel

data.name: settings-panel-tab-integrations
data.comment: Integrations tab label in settings panel

data.name: settings-panel-tab-exceptions
data.comment: Exceptions tab label in settings panel

data.name: settings-panel-exceptions-title
data.comment: Title label for the exceptions panel section

data.name: settings-panel-exceptions-description
data.value: Review which attributes are read-only or excluded from automation, and confirm audit status before making changes.
data.comment: Description text for the exceptions panel purpose

data.name: settings-panel-exceptions-select-all-tooltip
data.value: Select or clear all attribute rows
data.comment: Tooltip for the select all checkbox in the exceptions table header

data.name: settings-panel-exceptions-attribute-name
data.comment: Header label for the Attribute Name column in the exceptions table

data.name: settings-panel-exceptions-attribute-type
data.comment: Header label for the Attribute Type column in the exceptions table

data.name: settings-panel-exceptions-read-only
data.comment: Header label for the ReadOnly column in the exceptions table

data.name: settings-panel-exceptions-automation
data.comment: Header label for the Automation column in the exceptions table

data.name: settings-panel-exceptions-attribute-name-tooltip
data.value: Display name of the attribute being reviewed
data.comment: Tooltip for the Attribute Name column header in the exceptions table

data.name: settings-panel-exceptions-attribute-type-tooltip
data.value: Attribute data type with a matching icon
data.comment: Tooltip for the Attribute Type column header in the exceptions table

data.name: settings-panel-exceptions-read-only-tooltip
data.value: Indicates whether the attribute is read-only for updates
data.comment: Tooltip for the ReadOnly column header in the exceptions table

data.name: settings-panel-exceptions-automation-tooltip
data.value: Shows automation status and additional guidance
data.comment: Tooltip for the Automation column header in the exceptions table

data.name: settings-panel-tab-about
data.comment: About tab label in settings panel

data.name: settings-panel-show-field-icons-label
data.comment: Label for Show Field Type Icons switch control

data.name: settings-panel-show-field-icons-description
data.value: Visual indicators help quickly identify field types such as text, number, date, lookup, and picklist values. Icons improve usability by providing instant recognition of data types, making it easier to filter and analyze audit records based on specific field attributes without reading detailed descriptions.
data.comment: Description for Show Field Type Icons switch control

data.name: settings-panel-show-non-auditable-fields-label
data.comment: Label for Show Non-Auditable Fields switch control

data.name: settings-panel-show-non-auditable-fields-description
data.value: Display all entity fields in the selection dropdown, including those with audit tracking disabled. This provides complete visibility of the data model and helps identify which fields are not being tracked. Useful for administrators reviewing audit configuration and ensuring critical fields have audit enabled.
data.comment: Description for Show Non-Auditable Fields switch control

data.name: settings-panel-use-custom-colors-label
data.comment: Label for Use Custom Colors switch control

data.name: settings-panel-use-custom-colors-description
data.value: Apply a personalized color palette to the audit history interface for better visual distinction and accessibility. Custom colors can highlight different action types, user groups, or importance levels, making it easier to spot patterns and anomalies in audit data. Supports high-contrast themes for improved readability.
data.comment: Description for Use Custom Colors switch control

data.name: settings-panel-do-not-use-colors-label
data.comment: Label for Do not use colors switch control

data.name: settings-panel-auto-refresh-label
data.comment: Label for Auto Refresh switch control

data.name: settings-panel-auto-refresh-description
data.value: Enable automatic polling to keep audit history data current without manual refresh. The control queries the Dataverse audit log every 60 seconds to retrieve the latest changes. This ensures real-time visibility of audit events for active monitoring scenarios, compliance reviews, and incident response. Network bandwidth and API limits are respected to prevent performance impact.
data.comment: Description for Auto Refresh switch control

data.name: settings-panel-enable-graph-label
data.comment: Label for Enable Graph switch control

data.name: settings-panel-enable-graph-description
data.value: Connect to Microsoft Graph API to access user profiles, organizational data, and enhanced security features. This integration enables real-time user information synchronization, advanced permission checks, and seamless authentication with Azure Active Directory for comprehensive audit tracking across your organization.
data.comment: Description for Enable Graph switch control

data.name: settings-panel-enable-pureview-label
data.comment: Label for Enable Pureview switch control

data.name: settings-panel-enable-pureview-description
data.value: Integrate with Microsoft Pureview for advanced data governance, compliance monitoring, and information protection. This enables automatic data classification, sensitivity labeling, audit log retention policies, and compliance reporting to meet regulatory requirements such as GDPR, HIPAA, and SOX while maintaining complete audit trail visibility.
data.comment: Description for Enable Pureview switch control

data.name: settings-panel-exceptions-content
data.value: Configure exception handling and error management settings for the audit history control.
data.comment: Content for Exceptions tab in settings panel

data.name: settings-panel-about-title
data.comment: Title text in About tab of settings panel

data.name: settings-panel-about-version
data.comment: Version text in About tab of settings panel

data.name: settings-panel-about-description
data.value: Enterprise-grade audit tracking for Dynamics 365 and Power Platform.
data.comment: Description text in About tab of settings panel

data.name: settings-panel-user-properties-title
data.comment: Title for User Properties section in About tab

data.name: settings-panel-user-name-label
data.comment: Label for user name field in About tab

data.name: settings-panel-user-id-label
data.comment: Label for user ID field in About tab

data.name: settings-panel-security-roles-label
data.comment: Label for security roles list in About tab

data.name: settings-panel-no-security-roles
data.comment: Message displayed when user has no security roles

data.name: settings-panel-loading-user-info
data.comment: Loading message while fetching user information

data.name: settings-panel-button-save
data.comment: Save button label in settings panel

data.name: settings-panel-button-cancel
data.comment: Cancel button label in settings panel

data.name: custom-color-panel-not-implemented
data.comment: Placeholder text for custom color panel feature
